74960.subject: рҹ“ү Bitcoin loses $62k as tech stocks crash
74960.body:
TodayвҖҷs newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick OвҖҷNeill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger youвҖҷll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure youвҖҷre subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,281 (-3.1%) | **ETH** $1,652 (-5.6%) | **SOL** $69 (-6.9%)

* US tech stocks fall with Nasdaq 100 futures[ shedding 2.5%](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2069358768781959406?s=20) вҖ” SpaceX falls [below $150](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2069361805332185297?s=20) in premarket trading

* Bitcoin falls [below $62K](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2069356606484029679?s=20) as over [$700M gets liquidated](https://www.coinglass.com/liquidations) from crypto markets in the last 24 hours

* South Korean stock exchange gets halted as it [drops 10%](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2069322685717348382?s=20) вҖ” Nikkei [loses 3.5%](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2069344505577222318?s=20)

* Five Eyes releases [statement](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2069208875296080102?s=20) on frontier AI models: вҖң==Frontier Al models are anticipated to exceed current industry expectations, fundamentally transforming both offensive and defensive cyber capabilities. The timeline is not years, it is monthsвҖң==

* US issues [oil license to Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2069047808506622334?s=20) allowing its official return to global markets for the first time in 8 years

* Ethlabs, a non-profit [R&D lab](https://x.com/ethlabs_org/status/2069104073245159573?s=20) for Ethereum and ETH, gets announced

* Trump signs [quantum focused](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2069181670369161490?s=20) executive order

* Memecoin trading platform fomo raises capital at a [$550M valuation](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2069032646940688415?s=20)

* Bank of America expects [3 rate hikes](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2069043368068559175?s=20) this year

* Bittensor releases 18 month [roadmap to decentralization](https://x.com/const_reborn/status/2068760333787808043?s=20)

* MoneyGram becomes a [Solana validator](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2069037723785011549?s=20) and joins their developer platform

* Seedance 2.5 [features](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2069263703569297618?s=20) are revealed

* Ripple receives preliminary [MiCA approval](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2069363171354181742?s=20)

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”


вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

Fear and Greed is at
19
(Extreme
Fear).
Bitcoin has now spent more than two weeks below $65,000, grinding
lower to
$62K
this morning without a clear catalyst to reverse the trend. ETF
outflows have accumulated for six straight weeks and seasonal
summer volume is keeping activity thin.

What is notable today is where the response is coming from. The
White House just moved on quantum computing with Bitcoin
specifically in mind. Strategy is quietly rebuilding its cash
reserve. MoneyGram is now validating on Solana.

The market is quiet. The infrastructure calendar is not. Let's
dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Strategy Just Rebuilt Its Cash Reserve After Bitcoin Buy

Strategy bought 520 BTC last week while directing most of its
stock sale proceeds toward rebuilding its cash reserve to $1.4
billion. The reserve supports dividends on STRC preferred shares,
which hit a record low below $83 earlier in the week.

Total Bitcoin holdings now stand at 847,363 BTC.

What mechanism does Strategy's preferred stock have that helps
it recover from low prices?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/cBrt9j8AcvOXuQw53QCeKg~~/AAQRxRA~/7J7BjbEVWa6iJxPsdsMY3uLyqoRuBSi8OAYVRHyXxJ3eoATcME9OfucSWdNDlIMzSOWAp4TeiicTRLYr6FNQtrnMUZsploXZwSbSWI4c4dRrdKMjM27gYWddN6Z7MMyAFavb9nDi1G6F7G3YnG5_e6gINIHunvV-ZwOH6cdUCWv1p3r2-D2fywz0mPrmW7qE6QBDWHCij03HMdzWgydSPnfJrli_bhbOrR3824q_hzI~ )

74953.subject: Scaling AI Agents Without Losing Control
74953.body:
AI NOW & BEYOND

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: AI NOW & BEYOND


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: AI NOW & BEYOND

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/scaling-ai-agents-without-losing-control-gptai-hgxbc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B9qTK1xR5Q5ya0uOrDtA23g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=04WSp6uSR8fsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqqhnvm1~gu-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqqhnvm1-gu
  
Today in AI NOW & BEYOND рҹ”Ҙ The Most Important AI Skill Everybody Is Talking About UK Bans Social Media for Under-16s in Landmark Online Safety Move AI Highlights of the Week Too Important to Miss Insights from 200 Security and AI executives sponsored 57% of enterprises have 10+ AI agents in production вҖ” but most lack the controls to govern them safely Security and governance is the #1 barrier to scaling AI agents, cited by 43% of IT and AI decision-makers Learn how leading organizations are shifting to unified agent operations to close the gap before it's too late Read the report to learn how to govern, secure, and operate your AI workforce at scale. Read the Report UK Bans Social Media for Under-16s in Landmark Online Safety Move Major platforms like TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat and YouTube to face strict age restrictions under new legislation The UK government has announced a sweeping ban on social media use for under-16s, describing the move as a way to вҖңgive children their childhood back.вҖқ The law is expected to pass Parliament before the end of the year and come into force in Spring 2027. Key Points: Platforms affected: The ban covers major platforms including TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, Facebook, YouTube, X, and Bluesky. Messaging apps excluded: Services like WhatsApp and Signal are not included in the restrictions. Extra safety rules: The law also targets AI chatbots with вҖңromantic companionвҖқ features, requiring minimum age limits of 18. Australia-style model: The UK is following AustraliaвҖҷs approach but plans stricter enforcement, including limits on livestreaming, stranger messaging, and infinite scrolling. Age verification required: Platforms may use digital ID, facial scans, bank cards, or email-linked verification to enforce age limits. Public support claimed: The government says 9 in 10 parents support the move, though surveys show doubts about effectiveness. Enforcement concerns: Critics warn teens could bypass restrictions using VPNs or move to less regulated platforms. Why It Matters: This could become one of the toughest social media rules ever proposed in a Western democracy. It may force platforms like TikTok and Instagram to change how they verify age, design youth features, and handle privacy in the UK, while sparking major debates over enforcement. Read more AI Highlights of the Week SpaceX Hits $2.6T, Briefly Overtakes

74951.subject: GPT debunked Mythos hype
74951.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** OpenAI launched a cyber model that does exactly what Anthropic's Mythos was locked up for, and nobody moved to ban it. Google put $75 million into AI filmmaking and the artiest studio in film is making movies with AI now. Plus Trump's quantum order and 11 ways to stop hitting your Claude limit. 



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Cyber:** Why does OpenAI get to ship what Anthropic was banned for?

* **Hollywood:** Why is the movie star suddenly optional?

* **Quantum:** What's behind Trump's 2028 deadline?

* **Claude:** How do you stop running out of Claude?


----------

----------
## [GPT debunked Mythos hype](https://x.com/sama/status/2069121360744550796)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/06f124b2-37a2-4ff9-abcf-6a5b269fa421/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_23.png?t=1782206718)
Caption: 

OpenAI shipped the full version of GPT-5.5-Cyber last night, a model built to hunt down software vulnerabilities and patch them, which Altman says posts state-of-the-art numbers on the CyberGym benchmark. 

That is the exact capability Anthropic locked Mythos away for and got Fable 5 banned over.

Anthropic's pitch was that the capability was too dangerous to release. Researchers had already said it was nothing special, since the same vulnerability-hunting runs in GPT-5.5, Claude Opus and other models. 

OpenAI gates its cyber model to vetted defenders, the same way Anthropic gated Mythos, but OpenAI's never drew a ban.

So why did one lab get banned and not the other? 

First of all, it's not even a public release yet. And OpenAI is Washington's favorite child. 

They hired a co-author of Trump's AI plan last week, while Anthropic spent the month fighting the same White House. 

One lab is on Washington's good side, and it ships the same kind of model with none of the consequences.


----------



----------
_Special highlight from our network_

## [Most businesses are experimenting with AI. The smartest ones are rebuilding around it.](https://link.genai.works/Bxca)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c73f94d-f9e0-41c1-b666-ec1b40ff82e8/image.png?t=1782206454)
Follow image link: (https://link.genai.works/Bxca)
Caption: 

Bolting AI onto an existing workflow gets you a few wins. Redesigning the workflow around AI changes the economics. The gap bet
